_meta.description: Auto-generated silver evaluation set for NHS Shetland Annual Report 2018/19. Answers produced by the pipeline (retrieval + Ollama generation) and filtered to generation_confidence=1.0. NOT human-verified.

queries.question: What was the Capital Resource Limit for NHS Shetland in 2018/19?
queries.expected_answer: The Capital Resource Limit for NHS Shetland in 2018/19 was £6k above the gross expenditure on capital assets, which was £699k. Therefore, the approved capital resource limit was £705k.
